css.fix_range_sliders: input[type=range] { height: 0px; position: absolute; z-index: 1; } input[type=range].range-selector, input[type=range].range-selector + div, input[type=range].range-selector::-moz-range-track, input[type=range].range-selector::-moz-range-progress { pointer-events: none; } input[type=range].range-selector::-moz-range-thumb { pointer-events: all; } input[type=range].range-selector::-moz-range-track { background: #f93; }
